name: space-engineer-2-geothermal-power
description: Geothermal Power — a Space Engineers 2 mod dataset adding a three-tier geothermal chain organised by drilling depth: Geothermal Well 2.5 m (shallow, low-enthalpy, water-driven), Deep Borehole Geothermal 5 m (EGS-style hot-dry-rock, water-driven, biome-agnostic mid-tier), and Magma Tap 5 m (direct lava tap, locked to volcanic biomes, produces obsidian as byproduct). Also introduces lava as a new fluid (location-bound in v0.1, pumpability deferred) and obsidian as a new raw material (forward-hooks Stone & Concrete's Cement chain and a future Glass mod).
